capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a cryptographic key management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a cryptographic key management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise cryptographic key management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the cryptographic key management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the cryptographic key management service reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent cryptographic key management service efficacy review

capability_questions.capability_name: Encryption and Key Management Policy and Procedures

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide cryptographic procedures and policies?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the organization have enterprise-wide cryptographic procedures and policies.

questions.prompt: Are the policies and procedures reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the policies and procedures reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a key management solution to manage the cryptographic keys?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a key management solution to manage the cryptographic keys.
questions.evaluation_focus: Key management solution for cryptographic keys

questions.prompt: Does the key management system support automation for all keys in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the key management system support automation for all keys in the enterprise.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation support for all enterprise keys

questions.prompt: Does the key management solution configuration get reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the key management solution configuration get reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent key management solution configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the key management solution integrate with other systems like data management and certificate management solutions?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the key management solution integrate with other systems like data management and certificate management solutions.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with data management and certificate management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy clear roles and responsibilities for CEK management?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise deploy clear roles and responsibilities for CEK management.
questions.evaluation_focus: Clear CEK management roles and responsibilities

questions.prompt: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key provisioning policies?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the organization have enterprise-wide key provisioning policies.

questions.prompt: Are the key provisioning policies and procedures reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the key provisioning policies and procedures reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Are cryptographic keys stored securely?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are cryptographic keys stored securely.

questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the organization have a formalized documented process for key provisioning.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use automation to provision keys?

questions.prompt: Are the key provisioning processes and procedures reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the key provisioning processes and procedures reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the organization have a formalized documented process for key rotation?
